suggestions.title: Make prompt parsing resilient to CRLF line endings
suggestions.recommendation: Normalize prompt line endings before parsing section markers and add unit test coverage.

suggestions.title: Expand retry coverage for all transient status codes and exhaustion
suggestions.recommendation: Add parameterized tests for 429/500/502/503 and an exhaustion-path assertion for [1,2,4] backoff with final HTTP error.

suggestions.title: Validate prompt hash logging across retries
suggestions.recommendation: Add retry-path logging test that asserts prompt hash is logged for each attempt and remains consistent.

suggestions.title: Validate default runtime prompt path
suggestions.recommendation: Add a test verifying default PROMPT_TEMPLATE_PATH points to prompts/get_1985_yankees.txt and exists at runtime.

suggestions.title: Normalize standalone carriage returns in prompt parsing
suggestions.recommendation:
Normalize  as well as 
 and add a unit test for CR-only line endings.
